action.reasoning: Observation: test_enhance.py failed at torchaudio.load due to missing torchcodec (default backend in recent torchaudio); model loading from local copy succeeded on CPU. Analysis: soundfile is pre-installed, loads mono WAVs directly to numpy (ideal for (T,) -> (1,T) tensor for enhance_batch); switch I/O, add GPU support, fix shape to (B,T), test on val subset for PESQ baseline (~2.8-3.2 expected for MetricGAN+ on this data). predict.py must be self-contained, offline-loadable from checkpoint dir, follow exact contract (no network, same filenames, 16kHz). Decision: update test_enhance.py, write full predict.py + minimal train.py (copies pretrained as ckpt), run test to validate+get val PESQ+time measurement, then submit_eval with this strong baseline before iterating.
